title: Job Openings at Shulifang Biotechnology
content:
Shulifang Biotechnology is a Chinese company located in the lekki free zone Lagos Nigeria. which produces and manages household daily necessities, such as dishwashing liquid, powder detergent, edible oil, etc

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Merchandiser

Job Locations: Trade Fair, Abule-Egba - Lagos, Sango-Ota - Ogun, and Ogbomoso - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Ensure products are properly displayed in stores.
	Increase product visibility and brand awareness.
	Maintain good relationships with Distributors.
	Submit daily market reports and product visibility pictures.
	Monitor competitors' activities and provide market feedback.


Requirements
Experience:


	Previous experience in merchandising, sales, retail, or marketing is preferred.
	Experience in FMCG products is an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to build and maintain relationships with retailers and customers.
	Strong negotiation and persuasion skills.
	Good organizational and time-management skills.
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
	Basic numerical and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to prepare and submit accurate reports.
	Proficiency in using smartphones for reporting and taking product visibility pictures.


Personal Qualities:


	Honest and trustworthy.
	Energetic and physically fit.
	Self-motivated and target-oriented.
	Neat appearance and professional conduct.
	Punctual and reliable.
	Attention to detail.
	Ability to follow instructions and company policies.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 25th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Driver

Job Location: Oregun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND / NCE / HND qualification
	Valid driver’s license (appropriate class for the vehicle type)
	3–5 years driving experience
	Good knowledge of road safety rules and traffic regulations
	Familiarity with local routes and navigation (especially within assigned region)
	Physically fit and able to drive for long hours when required
	Ability to read and write basic English
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of responsibility, punctuality, and reliability
	Clean driving record (no major traffic violations)
	Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge Additional Requirements (Optional)
	Experience driving executives or company staff
	Ability to use GPS and mobile navigation apps
	Willingness to travel when required
	Professional appearance and attitude.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 24th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail

 

 

3.) Experienced Field Marketer

Job Locations: Abakaliki - Ebonyi, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Aba - Abia, Uyo - Akwa Ibom, and Calabar - Cross River
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Are you a charismatic and results-driven marketer looking for a new challenge? Do you have a passion for innovative personal care products?
	We're seeking a talented Marketer to join our team! As a key member of our marketing team, you'll be responsible for developing and executing strategies to drive sales, increase brand awareness, and expand our customer base.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement marketing campaigns to promote our products
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to create engaging content, promotions, and product launches
	Analyze market trends, customer insights, and sales data to inform marketing strategies
	Build and maintain relationships with key partners, influencers, and customers
	Meet and exceed sales and marketing targets.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree / HND or NCE qualification 
	3+ years of marketing experience, preferably in the personal care or consumer goods industry
	Must reside in Ebonyi, Rivers, Abia, Akwa Ibom or Cross River
	Proven track record of success in driving sales growth and brand awareness
	Excellent communication, creative, and problem-solving skills
	Strong analytical and data-driven approach to marketing
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 24th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Social Media Content Creator / Marketer Job at Oasis Apartment




        
    

        
        The Oasis Apartment is a luxury shortlet and serviced apartment brand with multiple properties in Lagos, including locations in Ikate (Lekki), Lekki Phase 1, and Osapa London. Popular for its spacious 1-to-2 bedroom setups, it features modern amenities like swimming pools, children's play areas, and 24/7 power.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Content Creator / Marketer

Job Location: Ikate / Lekki, Lagos

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Create engaging content that showcases our products and brand.
	Manage and grow our social media presence.
	Stay ahead of trends and bring creative ideas to life.
	Drive engagement and build a strong online community.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Public Relations Officer Job at Mudiame University




        
    

        
        Mudiame University is a privately-owned University in Irrua, Edo State, Nigeria. The institution has been officially accredited and/or recognized by the National Universities Commission (NUC), Nigeria, and is on a mission to contribute to the sustainable welfare of society with expertise in science, technology and business, and through teaching, research and community service.

Mudiame University has the vision to be a world-leading institution for technological innovation that addresses the challenges of agriculture and food safety, energy, health, manufacturing, oil and gas, security and transportation on a regional and global scale.

Applications are invited from suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Public Relations Officer

Job Location: Irrua, Edo

Requirements


	Good honours Degree – HND or BSc with a minimum of Second Class Lower Division in a relevant field from a recognized institution 
	Possession of NYSC Discharge/Exemption/Exclusion Certificate.
	Registered/certified member of a relevant professional body with a practicing License.
	Possession of a higher degree will be of added advantage
	Computer Literacy is compulsory, except Artisans. Interviews will include Computer-Based Tests.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
